description: Expected findings for anti-IL-4 and anti-IL-13 monoclonal antibodies (dupilumab, tralokinumab). IL-4 and IL-13 drive Th2 responses, IgE production, and goblet cell hyperplasia. Blockade primarily relevant for atopic/allergic indications. Cynomolgus monkey is the typical species. Inherits Fc-mediated base findings from general_mab.

expected_findings.rationale: IL-4 drives IgE class switching; blockade expected to reduce IgE. (Dupilumab prescribing information)

expected_findings.description: Eosinophil count modulation (transient eosinophilia, then suppression)
expected_findings.severity_threshold: Hypereosinophilia (>5.0 x 10^9/L) with organ involvement = adverse
expected_findings.rationale: IL-4/IL-13 are eosinophil survival factors; complex biphasic response. Initial eosinophilia followed by suppression.

expected_findings.description: Goblet cell hypoplasia in respiratory/GI mucosa
expected_findings.severity_threshold: Progressive loss of mucosal barrier = adverse
expected_findings.rationale: IL-13 drives goblet cell differentiation; blockade reduces mucus production.
